subcodes.first_line: Thou didst question the necessity for prayer, and the wisdom that might lie behind it. What reason could there be, thou didst ask
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المقبله الی ملکوت الله قد قرئت نمیقتک اللطیفه الانشاء البدیعه المعنی
subcodes.subjects: @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @power of prayer, @importance of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
